config.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose:			 
				check whether user is authenticated if not return to login poge
	"""	
	try:
	#start of try block
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsRoleConfigurationAuthenticated
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			self.session.custom.TopViewHeader = "Role Configuration"
			system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			#message handler to get role based data on view for selection
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType='roleData', payload={},scope="page")			
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Role Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/Role')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup -> Role')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 8/03/2024
		Purpose:			 
				Save data for user/role based login in table
		Update Date:- 10/01/2025
		pupose: send email for new screen access to user
		author:Aniket Sagar
	"""	
	try:
		createdBy = self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		#save data for role based login
		if self.getSibling("TabContainer").props.currentTabIndex == 0:
			MST_Role_Id = self.getSibling("TabContainer").custom.selectedRoleID
			screens = self.getSibling("TabContainer").custom.screenData
			for screen in screens:
				moduleId = screen["moduleId"]
				formID =  screen["Id"]
				isEdit = screen["IsSelected"]
				Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Roles.InsertRELRoleForm.UpdateRELRoleForm(MST_Role_Id, moduleId, formID, createdBy, isEdit)
				message = "Roles Updated successfully."
				state = "success"
		else:
			#save data for user based login
			count=0
			MST_Role_Id = self.getSibling("TabContainer").custom.selectedRoleID
			editedFormIDs=[]
			MST_User_Id = self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("UserColumnContainer").getChild("UserModuleFlexRepeater").custom.selectUserId
			screens  = self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("UserColumnContainer").getChild("UserFormFlexRepeater").custom.screenData
			for screen in screens:
				moduleId = screen["moduleId"]
				formID =  screen["Id"]
				isEdit = screen["IsSelected"]
				Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Roles.InsertRELRoleForm.UpdateRELUserForm(MST_User_Id, moduleId, formID, createdBy, isEdit)
				message = "User Roles updated successfully."
				state = "success"
				if (isEdit==True):
					editedFormIDs.append(formID)
					count=count+1
			system.perspective.print("formIDS------------------->")
			system.perspective.print(editedFormIDs)
			
			if(MST_Role_Id!=2 or MST_Role_Id!=66):
				try:
					Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Roles.sendMailNewFormAccess.sendMail(editedFormIDs, createdBy,MST_User_Id,count)
					system.perspective.print("Email Sent---------------->")
				except Exception as e:
					system.perspective.print(e)
					
					
		#reset selection and show success message
		
		
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType='roleData', payload={},scope="page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType="saveAction", payload={},scope="page")	
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
						
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Role Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/RoleConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> cntColumn/cntBody/btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
		message = "Something went wrong.Please contact System Adminstration."
		state = "Error"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
		
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 8/03/2024
		Purpose:			 
				Enabled Save button
	"""	
	try:
	#start of try block
		self.props.enabled= True
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Role Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/RoleConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:saveButton  -> btn_Save')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

try:
		# implement your handler here
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Getting data from Module Selection 
		"""	
		moduleId = int(payload["ModuleID"])
		self.custom.moduleIds.append(moduleId)
		moduleIds = self.custom.moduleIds
		screenData = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("TabContainer").custom.screenData
		optionList = []
		count = 0
		for screen in screenData:
			if screen["moduleId"] in moduleIds:
				dict = {
					"instanceStyle": {
					  "classes": ""
					},
					"instancePosition": {}
				  }
				dict["fieldName"] = screen["fieldName"]
				dict["Id"] = screen["Id"]
				dict["moduleId"] = screen["moduleId"]
				dict["IsSelected"] = screen["IsSelected"]
				if screen["IsSelected"]:
					count+=1
				optionList.append(dict)
		#Select All Checkbox selection if all options are selected
		if len(optionList) == count:
			self.getSibling("selectAllCheckBox").props.selected =True
		else:
			self.getSibling("selectAllCheckBox").props.selected =False
		self.getSibling("FormFlexRepeater").props.instances = optionList
	except:
		screenName ='Role configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/RoleConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('MessageHandler-->moduleSelection')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

# implement your handler here
	"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Refresh Module Instance List
	"""	
	system.perspective.print("refresh ")
	self.refreshBinding('props.instances')
	system.perspective.print("refresh completed ")

# implement your handler here
	try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Get all roles data into Role Instance. 
		"""	
		dataset = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Roles.getData.getRoles()
		pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dataset)
		optionList = []
		for data in pyData:
			dict = {
				"instanceStyle": {
				  "classes": ""
				},
				"instancePosition": {}
			  }
			dict["fieldName"] = data["RoleName"]
			dict["Id"] = data["MST_Role_Id"]
			optionList.append(dict)
		self.parent.custom.roleData = optionList
	except:
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Role Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/RoleConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:getData  -> TabContainer')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

try:
		# implement your handler here
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Get all role data into Role Instance.

		dataset = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Roles.getData.getRoles()

try:
		# implement your handler here
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Populate data on User selection. 
		"""	
		moduleId = int(payload["ModuleID"])
		self.custom.moduleIds.append(moduleId)
		moduleIds = self.custom.moduleIds
		screenData = self.getSibling("UserFormFlexRepeater").custom.screenData
		optionList = []
		count = 0
		for screen in screenData:
			if screen["moduleId"] in moduleIds:
				dict = {
					"instanceStyle": {
					  "classes": ""
					},
					"instancePosition": {}
				  }
				dict["fieldName"] = screen["fieldName"]
				dict["Id"] = screen["Id"]
				dict["moduleId"] = screen["moduleId"]
				dict["IsSelected"] = screen["IsSelected"]
				if screen["IsSelected"]:
					count+=1
				optionList.append(dict)
		#All Select checkbox selection if all form are selected
		if len(optionList) == count:
			self.getSibling("selectAllCheckBox").props.selected =True
		else:
			self.getSibling("selectAllCheckBox").props.selected =False
		self.getSibling("UserFormFlexRepeater").props.instances = optionList
	except:
		screenName ='Role configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/RolePermission/TabContainer/UserColumnContainer')  
		errorFunction = str('MessageHandler-->usermoduleSelection')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Populate data on User selection. 
		"""	
		userID = payload["userID"]
		self.custom.selectUserId = userID
		dataset = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Roles.getData.getUserModules(userID)
		pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dataset)
		optionList = []
		for data in pyData:
			dict = {
				"instanceStyle": {
				  "classes": ""
				},
				"instancePosition": {}
			  }
			dict["fieldName"] = data["Module name"]
			if data["Edit permission"] == 1:
				dict["IsSelected"] = True
			else:
				dict["IsSelected"] =False
			dict["Id"] = data["Sr No"]
			optionList.append(dict)
		self.custom.userModuleData = optionList
	except:
		screenName ='Role configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/RolePermission/TabContainer/UserColumnContainer')  
		errorFunction = str('MessageHandler-->usermoduleData')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

try:
		# implement your handler here
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Get UserForm Data. 
		"""	
		userID = payload["userID"]
		system.perspective.print("userscreenData")
		dataset = Project_VECV.NamedQuery.Admin.Roles.getData.getUserScreen(userID)
		pyData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(dataset)
		optionList = []
		for data in pyData:
			dict = {
				"instanceStyle": {
				  "classes": ""
				},
				"instancePosition": {}
			  }
			dict["fieldName"] = data["Screen name"]
			if data["Edit permission"] == 1:
				dict["IsSelected"] = True
			else:
				dict["IsSelected"] =False
			dict["Id"] = data["FormID"]
			dict["moduleId"] = data["ModuleID"]
			optionList.append(dict)
		self.custom.screenData = optionList
	except:
		screenName ='Role configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/RolePermission/TabContainer/UserColumnContainer')  
		errorFunction = str('MessageHandler-->userscreenData')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Switch Tab index based on payload received.
	"""	
	try:
	#start of try block
		
		self.props.currentTabIndex = payload["CurrentTabName"]
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Role Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/RoleConfiguration')

		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Action for Cancel/Save button and Data reset on screen
	"""	
	try:
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType='roleData', payload={},scope="page")
		self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("RoleColumnContainer").getChild("ModuleFlexRepeater").custom.moduleIds = []
		self.getSibling("TabContainer").custom.moduleData = []
		self.getSibling("TabContainer").custom.selectedRoleID = 0
		self.getSibling("TabContainer").custom.userData = []
		self.getSibling("TabContainer").custom.screenData = []
		self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("RoleColumnContainer").getChild("FormFlexRepeater").props.instances = []
		self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("UserColumnContainer").getChild("UserModuleFlexRepeater").custom.moduleIds = []
		self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("UserColumnContainer").getChild("UserModuleFlexRepeater").custom.selectUserId = ''
		self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("UserColumnContainer").getChild("UserModuleFlexRepeater").custom.userModuleData = []
		self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("UserColumnContainer").getChild("UserFormFlexRepeater").custom.screenData = []
		self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("UserColumnContainer").getChild("UserFormFlexRepeater").props.instances = []
		#disable save button
		self.getSibling("btn_Save").props.enabled = False
	except:
		screenName ='RoleConfiguration'
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/RoleConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:btnCancel:saveAction -> cntBody/TabContainer')  
		errorType=str('Application') 
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

# implement your handler here
	"""
		Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Action for Cancel/Save button 
	"""	
	try:
		#clear all instance that has data for operation
		self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("RoleColumnContainer").getChild("FormFlexRepeater").props.instances = []
		self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("UserColumnContainer").getChild("UserModuleFlexRepeater").custom.moduleIds = []
		self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("UserColumnContainer").getChild("UserModuleFlexRepeater").custom.userModuleData = []
		self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("UserColumnContainer").getChild("UserFormFlexRepeater").custom.screenData = []
	except:
		screenName ='RoleConfiguration'
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/RoleConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:btnCancel:Action -> cntBody/TabContainer')  
		errorType=str('Application') 
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

config.script:
try:
		"""
			Written By: Amitkumar Ravat
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: Action for Prev/Next button 
		"""	
		#check if there is Data not saved if so stop to switch tabs
		if self.getSibling("TabContainer").props.currentTabIndex == 0:
			if self.getSibling("btn_Save").props.enabled:
				state = "warning"
				message = "Please save changes before moving to next screen"
				Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
			else:
				self.getSibling("TabContainer").props.currentTabIndex = 1
				self.props.text = "Prev"
				system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType="saveAction", payload={},scope="page")
		else:
			if self.getSibling("btn_Save").props.enabled:
				state = "warning"
				message = "Please save changes before moving to previous screen"
				Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")	
			else:
				self.getSibling("TabContainer").props.currentTabIndex = 0
				self.props.text = "Next"
				system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType="saveAction", payload={},scope="page")
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Role Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/RoleConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> cntColumn/btn_Next')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block
